problem: How are trauma and stress responses inherited epigenetically across generations?
mechanism: Autophagy activation to clear misfolded proteins
hypothesis: If Autophagy activation to clear misfolded proteins is applied to epigenetically, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Mouse model knockout study with 4 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
